column.name: PSPHI
column.description: Current number of the appropriate project

column.name: UP
column.description: Number of the superior WBS element

column.name: DOWN
column.description: Number of the 1. subordinate WBS element

column.name: LEFT
column.description: Number of the left adjacent position in WBS

column.name: RIGHT
column.description: Number of the right adjacent position in WBS
